ops.text:
RESULTS + VERDICT (run complete; Tinker spend $0.758 of $9 cap; checkpoint tinker://...e29-askuser-sft-196).

SETUP CONFIRMED: qwen3-8b SFT LoRA (rank32, lr1e-4, batch16, 2 epochs -> 196 steps), incumbent WatcherRecipe. Split (E24-parity): n_train=1559 (137 carved for val out of the 1696 E24 train pool), n_val=137, n_test=202 (== E24's exact single-select eval), zero session straddle. Loss converged (6.84 -> ~0.27 by step 40). Ran via out/run_e29.py (faithful superset of bin/train.py that also scores the pool set under the same checkpoint in one $9 envelope).

GATE SET (E24-test, n=202) -- E24-exact metrics via e24_common.single_metrics:
  FT accuracy = 0.6040, 95% CI [0.5396, 0.6782]
  ECE = 0.0823 (15-bin E24-exact) / 0.0743 (e29lib 10-bin) -- both <= 0.10 PASS
  Brier multiclass 0.529, top-label 0.2155
  Floor (always-option-0) = 0.5743
  ci_excludes_floor = FALSE (CI lower 0.5396 < 0.5743)
  paired FT-vs-floor delta = +0.0297, 95% CI [-0.0050, +0.0645], excludes_zero = FALSE
  >>> gate_met = FALSE <<<

POOL TRANSFER (local-home, n=566 single-select, FULLY DISJOINT from mirror: 0 (session,tool_use) overlap, all 90 local sessions disjoint from mirror sessions; dedup was a no-op):
  FT accuracy = 0.5212, 95% CI [0.4823, 0.5601]
  Pool floor (always-option-0) = 0.5035, CI [0.4664, 0.5424]
  FT ECE = 0.0678, Brier multiclass 0.602
  paired FT-vs-pool-floor delta = +0.0177, CI [-0.0035, +0.0389], excludes_zero = FALSE

VERDICT (card-rule): CLEAN NULL. The FT beats E24's best baseline point estimate (0.604 vs 0.579) and the trivial floor point estimate (0.574) with good calibration (ECE 0.082 <= 0.10), BUT the pre-registered gate is NOT met: the accuracy CI does not exclude the 0.574 floor and the paired FT-vs-floor delta (+3.0pp) CI includes zero -> statistically indistinguishable from 'always predict option 0' at n=202. This exactly matches E24's caution that the pick target is dominated by an unbeatable option-ordering + 24%-custom prior. Cross-corpus transfer is weak (0.521 vs 0.504 pool floor, +1.8pp, CI includes zero) though still well-calibrated. The sentinel-AUC instrument card (MDE/DeLong) does NOT gate this arm -- human ground-truth picks are the ground truth; the bootstrap accuracy CI vs the trivial floor + ECE bound IS the applicable card rule, and it reads 'within noise floor'.

STEP-2 SHAPE NOTE (flagged for orchestrator): all 18 pool-account projects/ symlink to the single local /Users/yasyf/.claude/projects (reconfirms E24 CARD). Read once (dedup collapses the 18x). The 'cross-corpus' set is therefore local-home decisions; they happen to be fully disjoint from the mirror (a genuine held-out transfer set, zero training leakage), so the transfer number is sound, but it is local-vs-mirror, not a foreign-user corpus. Extraction touched local ~/.claude for a held-out eval only (never trained), per the explicit step-2 instruction.

ARTIFACTS (all under /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E29/out): train/e29_report.json, train/preds_test.jsonl (202 per-row probs), train/preds_pool.jsonl (566 per-row probs), train/best_checkpoint.txt, gate_test.json (gate verdict), pool_scored.json (transfer), pool_raw.jsonl (587 raw local), pool_eval.jsonl (566 deduped single-select), dedup_pool.py, run_e29.py, run.log. Raw per-row probs retained for a verify lane.
